entry.title: 「CQOI 2015」 任务查询系统
entry.summary: 最近实验室正在为其管理的超级计算机编制一套任务管理系统，而你被安排完成其中的查询部分。超级计算机中的任务用三元组(Si,Ei,Pi)描述，(Si,Ei,Pi)表示任务从第Si秒开始，在第Ei秒后结束（第Si秒和Ei秒任务也在运行），其优先级为Pi。同一时间可能有多个任务同时执行，它们的优先级可能相同，也可能不同。调度系统会经常向查询系统询问，第Xi秒正在运行的任务中，优先级最小的Ki个任务（即将任务按照优先级从小到大排序后取前Ki个）的优先级之和是多少。特别的，如果Ki大于第Xi秒正在运行的任务总数，则直接回答第Xi秒正在运行的任务优先级之和。上述所有参数均为整数，时间的范围在1到n之间（包含1和n）。
entry.content:
最近实验室正在为其管理的超级计算机编制一套任务管理系统，而你被安排完成其中的查询部分。超级计算机中的任务用三元组(Si,Ei,Pi)描述，(Si,Ei,Pi)表示任务从第Si秒开始，在第Ei秒后结束（第Si秒和Ei秒任务也在运行），其优先级为Pi。同一时间可能有多个任务同时执行，它们的优先级可能相同，也可能不同。调度系统会经常向查询系统询问，第Xi秒正在运行的任务中，优先级最小的Ki个任务（即将任务按照优先级从小到大排序后取前Ki个）的优先级之和是多少。特别的，如果Ki大于第Xi秒正在运行的任务总数，则直接回答第Xi秒正在运行的任务优先级之和。上述所有参数均为整数，时间的范围在1到n之间（包含1和n）。

链接🔗

「CQOI 2015」 任务查询系统

题解

把区间开始结束时间理解成差分，然后根据时间排序后在主席树上插入即可

代码

#include<cstdio>
#include<algorithm>
#include <cstring>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 2e5+10;
int rt[maxd<<5],ls[maxd<<5],rs[maxd<<5],size[maxd<<5];
long long sum[maxd<<5];
int x,a,b,c,tot;
void insert(int &rt,int last,int l,int r,int x)
{
    rt = ++tot; ls[rt] = ls[last],rs[rt] = rs[last];
    size[rt] = size[last]+((x>0)?1:-1);
    sum[rt] = (long long)sum[last] + x;
    //printf("%d %d %d %d %lld\n",rt,l,r,size[rt],sum[rt]);
    if(l==r) return ;
    int mid = (l+r)>>1;
    if(abs(x)<=mid) insert(ls[rt],ls[last],l,mid,x);
    else insert(rs[rt],rs[last],mid+1,r,x);
    //printf("%d %d %d %d %d\n",size[rt],size[last],l,r,x);
}
long long query(int y,int l,int r,int v)
{
    //printf("%d %d %d %d %d %d\n",y,l,r,size[y],size[ls[y]],size[rs[y]]);
    if(l==r)return min(v,size[y])*l;
    int mid = (l+r)>>1;
    if(v <= size[ls[y]]) return query(ls[y],l,mid,v);
    else return sum[ls[y]] + query(rs[y],mid+1,r,v-size[ls[y]]);
}
int eid;
struct node
{
    int pos,v;
}arr[maxd];
bool cmp(const node &x,const node &y)
{
    return x.pos < y.pos;
}
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    int n,m,k=0;scanf("%d %d",&n,&m);
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
    {
        scanf("%d %d %d",&a,&b,&c);
        arr[++eid].pos = a, arr[eid].v = c;
        arr[++eid].pos = b+1,arr[eid].v = -c;
        k = max(k,b+1);
    }
    sort(arr+1,arr+1+eid,cmp);
    int id=1;arr[eid+1].pos = 0;
    for(int i=1;i<=k;i++)
    {
        if(arr[id].pos!=i) rt[i] = rt[i-1];
        else
        {
            //printf("%d %d %d\n",i,i-1,arr[id].v);
            insert(rt[i],rt[i-1],1,10000000,arr[id++].v);
            while(arr[id].pos == i)
            {
                //printf("%d %d %d\n",i,i,arr[id].v);
                insert(rt[i],rt[i],1,10000000,arr[id++].v);
            }
        }
        //printf("%d %d %d %d\n",i,rt[i],size[ls[rt[i]]],size[rs[rt[i]]]);
    }
    long long ans = 1;
    for(int i=1;i<=m;i++)
    {
        scanf("%d %d %d %d",&x,&a,&b,&c);
        long long k = 1+(a*ans%c+b)%c;
        //printf("%d %lld\n",x,k);
        ans = query(rt[x],1,10000000,k);
        printf("%lld\n",ans);
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「ZJOI 2012」 灾难
entry.summary:
阿米巴是小强的好朋友。

阿米巴和小强在草原上捉蚂蚱。小强突然想，如果蚂蚱被他们捉灭绝了，那么吃蚂蚱的小鸟就会饿死，而捕食小鸟的猛禽也会跟着灭绝，从而引发一系列的生态灾难。

学过生物的阿米巴告诉小强，草原是一个极其稳定的生态系统。如果蚂蚱灭绝了，小鸟照样可以吃别的虫子，所以一个物种的灭绝并不一定会引发重大的灾难。
entry.content:
阿米巴是小强的好朋友。

阿米巴和小强在草原上捉蚂蚱。小强突然想，如果蚂蚱被他们捉灭绝了，那么吃蚂蚱的小鸟就会饿死，而捕食小鸟的猛禽也会跟着灭绝，从而引发一系列的生态灾难。

学过生物的阿米巴告诉小强，草原是一个极其稳定的生态系统。如果蚂蚱灭绝了，小鸟照样可以吃别的虫子，所以一个物种的灭绝并不一定会引发重大的灾难。

我们现在从专业一点的角度来看这个问题。我们用一种叫做食物网的有向图来描述生物之间的关系：

一个食物网有N个点，代表N种生物，如果生物x可以吃生物y，那么从y向x连一个有向边。

这个图没有环。

图中有一些点没有连出边，这些点代表的生物都是生产者，可以通过光合作用来生存； 而有连出边的点代表的都是消费者，它们必须通过吃其他生物来生存。

如果某个消费者的所有食物都灭绝了，它会跟着灭绝。

我们定义一个生物在食物网中的“灾难值”为，如果它突然灭绝，那么会跟着一起灭绝的生物的种数。

举个例子：在一个草场上，生物之间的关系是：

如果小强和阿米巴把草原上所有的羊都给吓死了，那么狼会因为没有食物而灭绝，而小强和阿米巴可以通过吃牛、牛可以通过吃草来生存下去。所以，羊的灾难值是1。但是，如果草突然灭绝，那么整个草原上的5种生物都无法幸免，所以，草的灾难值是4。

给定一个食物网，你要求出每个生物的灾难值。

链接🔗

「ZJOI 2012」 灾难

题解

支配点定义: 如果从点rootrootroot出发，到达点 yyy 的路上，存在点xxx，使得如果点xxx不能通过，则rootrootroot无法到达yyy ,则称xxx为yyy的支配点

题目就是求每个点所支配点的数量

每个点的支配点，为所有连向它点的LCA ， 这个可以画图感性理解下

然后我们根据TopSortTopSortTopSort, 对点依次进行LCALCALCA，然后将该点挂在LCALCALCA点下，这该点所支配点的数量为其子树的节点数量

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <queue>
#include <vector>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 1e5+10;
int fa[maxd][16],degree[maxd],p[maxd],cnt,d[maxd];
int n,x,y,ans[maxd];
vector<int> G[maxd],food[maxd],son[maxd];
//G 原图，G1[i] 为i节点的猎物
void topsort()
{
    queue<int> que;
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
        if(!degree[i]) G[0].push_back(i),food[i].push_back(0),degree[i]++;
    //同一图上存在两个入度为0的点，则会找不到lca
    que.push(0);
    while(!que.empty())
    {
        x = que.front();p[++cnt] = x;que.pop();
        for(int i=0;i<G[x].size();i++)
        {
            int v =G[x][i];
            --degree[v];
            if(!degree[v])que.push(v);
        }
    }
}
int lca(int x,int y)
{
    if(d[x] < d[y]) swap(x,y);
    for(int i=15;i>=0;i--) if(d[fa[x][i]] >= d[y]) x = fa[x][i];
    if(x==y) return x;
    for(int i=15;i>=0;i--) if(fa[x][i] != fa[y][i]) x = fa[x][i],y = fa[y][i];
    return fa[x][0];
}
int dfs(int x)
{
    ans[x] =1;
    for(int i=0;i<son[x].size();i++) ans[x] += dfs(son[x][i]);
    return ans[x];
}
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    scanf("%d",&n);
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
    {
        while(scanf("%d",&x)!=EOF&&x)
        {
            G[x].push_back(i);
            food[i].push_back(x); 
            ++degree[i];
        }
    }
    topsort();
    //printf("%d ",cnt);
    for(int i=2;i<=cnt;i++)
    {
        x = p[i];y = food[x][0];
        //printf("%d ",x);
        for(int j=1;j< food[x].size();j++) y = lca(y,food[x][j]);
        son[y].push_back(x); //点y是点x的支配点
        d[x] = d[y]+1;
        fa[x][0] = y;
        for(int j=1;j<=15;j++) fa[x][j] = fa[fa[x][j-1]][j-1]; //倍增
    }
    dfs(0);
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) printf("%d\n",ans[i]-1);
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「HDU 6621」 K-th Closest Distance
entry.summary:
You have an array: a1, a2, ......, an and you must answer for some queries.
For each query, you are given an interval [L, R] and two numbers p and K. Your goal is to find the Kth closest distance between p and aL, aL+1, ..., aR.
The distance between p and ai is equal to |p - ai|.
For example:
entry.content:
You have an array: a1, a2, ......, an and you must answer for some queries.
For each query, you are given an interval [L, R] and two numbers p and K. Your goal is to find the Kth closest distance between p and aL, aL+1, ..., aR.
The distance between p and ai is equal to |p - ai|.
For example:

A = {31, 2, 5, 45, 4 } and L = 2, R = 5, p = 3, K = 2.
|p - a2| = 1, |p - a3| = 2, |p - a4| = 42, |p - a5| = 1.
Sorted distance is {1, 1, 2, 42}. Thus, the 2nd closest distance is 1.

链接🔗

「HDU 6621」 K-th Closest Distance

题解

查询可以转换成, 给定ppp,求最小xxx,使得在区间[L,R][L,R][L,R]区间内，数值范围在[p−x,p+x][p-x,p+x][p−x,p+x]之间的数不小于kkk个
然后区间小于某数的数量可以用主席树实现,然后套上一个二分即可

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 1e6+10;
const int mx = 1e6+10;
int root[maxd],ls[maxd<<5],rs[maxd<<5],size[maxd<<5],tot,arr[maxd];
void insert(int &rt,int last,int l,int r,int v)
{
    rt = ++tot; ls[rt] = ls[last],rs[rt] = rs[last],size[rt] = size[last]+1;
    if(l==r) return;
    int mid = (l+r)>>1;
    if(v<=mid) insert(ls[rt],ls[last],l,mid,v);
    else insert(rs[rt],rs[last],mid+1,r,v);
}
int query(int x,int y,int l,int r,int v)
{
    if(!v) return 0;
    //printf("%d %d %d %d %d\n",l,r,v,size[x],size[y]);
    if(l==r) return size[y] - size[x];
    int mid = (l+r)>>1;
    if(v <= mid) return query(ls[x],ls[y],l,mid,v);
    else return size[ls[y]] - size[ls[x]] + query(rs[x],rs[y],mid+1,r,v);
}
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    int t,n,m,flag;scanf("%d",&t);
    while(t--)
    {
        scanf("%d %d",&n,&m);
        root[0] = 0;tot =0; flag = 0;
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&arr[i]);
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) insert(root[i],root[i-1],1,mx,arr[i]);
        for(int i=1;i<=m;i++)
        {
            int x,y,p,k;
            scanf("%d %d %d %d",&x,&y,&p,&k);
            x^=flag,y^=flag,p^=flag,k^=flag;
            int l=0,r=1e6,ans;
            while(l<=r)
            {
                int mid = (l+r)>>1;
                int ll = max(1,p-mid);
                int rr = min(maxd,p+mid);
                int now = query(root[x-1],root[y],1,mx,rr) - query(root[x-1],root[y],1,mx,ll-1);
                //printf("%d %d %d %d\n",ll,rr,query(root[x-1],root[y],1,mx,rr) ,query(root[x-1],root[y],1,mx,ll-1));
                if(now >= k) ans = mid,r = mid-1;
                else l = mid+1;
            }
            flag =ans;
            printf("%d\n",ans);
        }
        //printf("%d\n",query(root[0],root[5],1,mx,5)-query(root[0],root[5],1,mx,4));
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「NewCode 2019-3」 E. Big Integer
entry.summary:
For little pupils, a very large number usually means an integer with many many digits. Let's define a class of big integers which consists only of the digit one (11⋯1)(11 \cdots 1)(11⋯1). The first few integers in this class are 1,11,111,1111⋯1, 11, 111, 1111 \cdots1,11,111,1111⋯. Denote A(n)A(n)A(n) as the nnn-th smallest integer in this class. To make it even larger, we consider integers in the form of A(ab)A(a^b)A(ab)
. Now, given a prime number ppp , how many pairs (i,j)(i, j)(i,j) are there such that 1 ≤i≤n, 1≤j≤m, A(ij)≡0(mod p)\leq i \leq n,\ 1 \leq j \leq m,\ A(i^j) \equiv 0(mod \ p)≤i≤n, 1≤j≤m, A(ij)≡0(mod p)
entry.content:
For little pupils, a very large number usually means an integer with many many digits. Let's define a class of big integers which consists only of the digit one (11⋯1)(11 \cdots 1)(11⋯1). The first few integers in this class are 1,11,111,1111⋯1, 11, 111, 1111 \cdots1,11,111,1111⋯. Denote A(n)A(n)A(n) as the nnn-th smallest integer in this class. To make it even larger, we consider integers in the form of A(ab)A(a^b)A(ab)
. Now, given a prime number ppp , how many pairs (i,j)(i, j)(i,j) are there such that 1 ≤i≤n, 1≤j≤m, A(ij)≡0(mod p)\leq i \leq n,\ 1 \leq j \leq m,\ A(i^j) \equiv 0(mod \ p)≤i≤n, 1≤j≤m, A(ij)≡0(mod p)

The input contains multiple cases. The first line of the input contains a single integer T(1≤T≤100)T(1 \le T \le 100)T(1≤T≤100), the number of cases.
For each case, the input consists of a single line, which contains 3 positive integers p,n,m (p,n,m≤109)p, n, m \ (p, n, m \leq 10^9)p,n,m (p,n,m≤109).

链接🔗

「NewCode 2019-3」 E. Big Integer

题解

化简等式
(11⋯1)=(10n−19≡0(mod p))=(10n≡1(mod 9p))(11 \cdots 1) =(\frac{10^n - 1}{9}\equiv 0 (mod \ p)) = (10^n \equiv 1 (mod \ 9p))(11⋯1)=(910n−1​≡0(mod p))=(10n≡1(mod 9p))

根据 BezoutBezoutBezout 定理 , 线性同余方程有解，当且仅当 gcd(10n,9p)∣1gcd(10^n,9p)|1gcd(10n,9p)∣1

当 2∣p,5∣p2|p,5|p2∣p,5∣p 时，显然无解，输出000 即可

否则根据欧拉定理, 10n≡1(mod 9p)=10ϕ(9p)≡1(mod 9p)10^n \equiv 1 (mod \ 9p) = 10^{\phi(9p)} \equiv 1 (mod \ 9p)10n≡1(mod 9p)=10ϕ(9p)≡1(mod 9p)

因此我们需要找到 10imod 9p10^i mod \ 9p10imod 9p的循环节 ddd，也就是最小正整数解

根据欧拉定理推论： 若a,na,na,n互质，则满足 ax≡1(mod n)a^x \equiv 1 (mod \ n)ax≡1(mod n)的最小正整数解x0x_0x0​ 是 ϕ(n)\phi(n)ϕ(n)的约数。

因为n<1e9n < 1e9n<1e9，所以直接暴力枚举ϕ(n)\phi(n)ϕ(n)的约数，用快速幂进行验证是否正确即可

接下来我们统计有多少 i,ji,ji,j 满足 d∣ijd|i^jd∣ij 即可

根据算术基本定理， d∣ij=∏inpiki∣ijd | i^j = \prod_{i}^n p_{i}^{k_i} | i^jd∣ij=∏in​piki​​∣ij

考虑枚举jjj,则iii 必须是 g=∏inpi⌈kij⌉g = \prod_{i}^n p_{i}^{\left \lceil \frac{k_i}{j} \right \rceil}g=∏in​pi⌈jki​​⌉​ 的倍数，则数量为ng\frac{n}{g}gn​

由于 ∑ki<=30\sum k_i <=30∑ki​<=30 ，所以我们仅需枚举到30即可，对于30以上的部分，ggg值唯一

PsPsPs 本题可能卡64位精度，建议在快速幂过程中，用快速乘代替基础乘运算

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
long long t,n,m,p;
const long long inf = 1e18;
long long phi(long long x)
{
    long long ans = x;
    for(int i=2;i*i<=x;i++)
    {
        if(x%i==0)
        {
            ans = ans/i *(i-1);
            while(x%i == 0) x/=i;
        }
    }
    if(x>1) ans = ans/x * (x-1);
    return ans;
}
long long pow(long long a,long long b, long long mod)
{
    long long ans = 1ll;
    while(b)
    {
        if(b&1) ans = mul(ans,a,mod);
        a = a*a%mod;
        b>>=1;
    }
    return ans;
}
long long find(long long x)
{
    long long ans = x;
    for(long long i = 1;i*i<=x;i++)
    {
        if(x%i==0)
        {
            if(pow(10,i,9*p) == 1) ans = min(ans,i);
            if(pow(10,x/i,9*p) == 1) ans = min(ans,x/i);
        }
    }
    return ans;
}
long long pri[50],c[50],tot;
void divide(long long n)
{
    tot = 0;
    for(int i=2;i*i<=n;i++)
    {
        if(n%i == 0)
        {
            pri[++tot] = i,c[tot]=0;
            while(n%i==0) c[tot]++, n/=i;
        }
    }
    if(n>1) pri[++tot] = n ,c[tot]=1;
}
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    scanf("%lld",&t);
    while(t--)
    {
        scanf("%lld %lld %lld",&p,&n,&m);
        if(p%2==0||p%5==0)
        {
            printf("0\n");
            continue;
        }
        long long d = find(phi(9*p));
        //printf("%lld \n",phi(9*p));
        divide(d);
        long long ans = 0ll;
        for(int j=1;j<=min(m,30ll);j++)
        {
            long long g =1ll;
            for(int i=1;i<=tot;i++)
                g *=  pow(pri[i],((c[i]-1)/j+1),inf);
            ans += n/g;
        }
        long long g = 1ll;
        for(int i=1;i<=tot;i++) g*=pri[i];
        if(m>30)
        ans += (long long) (m-30) * (n/g);
        printf("%lld\n",ans);
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: Network Contest
entry.content:
Codeforces Round #576 (Div. 2)

A.City Day
B.Water Lily
C.MP3
D.Welfare State
E.Matching vs Independent Set
F.Rectangle Painting

entry.title: 「SCOI2008」奖励关
entry.summary:
你正在玩你最喜欢的电子游戏，并且刚刚进入一个奖励关。在这个奖励关里，系统将依次随机抛出k次宝物，每次你都可以选择吃或者不吃（必须在抛出下一个宝物之前做出选择，且现在决定不吃的宝物以后也不能再吃）。

宝物一共有n种，系统每次抛出这n种宝物的概率都相同且相互独立。也就是说，即使前k-1 次系统都抛出宝物1（这种情况是有可能出现的，尽管概率非常小），第k次抛出各个宝物的概率依然均为1/n。
entry.content:
你正在玩你最喜欢的电子游戏，并且刚刚进入一个奖励关。在这个奖励关里，系统将依次随机抛出k次宝物，每次你都可以选择吃或者不吃（必须在抛出下一个宝物之前做出选择，且现在决定不吃的宝物以后也不能再吃）。

宝物一共有n种，系统每次抛出这n种宝物的概率都相同且相互独立。也就是说，即使前k-1 次系统都抛出宝物1（这种情况是有可能出现的，尽管概率非常小），第k次抛出各个宝物的概率依然均为1/n。

获取第 i 种宝物将得到Pi分，但并不是每种宝物都是可以随意获取的。第i种宝物有一个前提宝物集合Si。只有当Si中所有宝物都至少吃过一次，才能吃第i 种宝物（如果系统抛出了一个目前不能吃的宝物，相当于白白的损失了一次机会）。注意，Pi 可以是负数，但如果它是很多高分宝物的前提，损失短期利益而吃掉这个负分宝物将获得更大的长期利益。

假设你采取最优策略，平均情况你一共能在奖励关得到多少分值？

链接🔗

「SCOI2008」奖励关

题解

DP[i][j] 表示还剩 i 次选择，到当前状态为j的最优期望值

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 1<<15;
double dp[100][maxd];
int arr[16],val[16];
int n,k;
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    scanf("%d %d",&k,&n);
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
    {
        scanf("%d",&val[i]);
        int x;
        while(1)
        {
            scanf("%d",&x);
            if(!x) break;
            arr[i] |= (1<<(x-1));
        }
    }
    for(int i=k;i>=1;i--)
        for(int j=0;j<(1<<n);j++)
            for(int l=1;l<=n;l++)
            {
                if((j&arr[l])==arr[l])
                    dp[i][j] += max(dp[i+1][j|(1<<(l-1))]+val[l],dp[i+1][j])*1.0/n;
                else dp[i][j] += dp[i+1][j]*1.0/n;
            }
    printf("%lf",dp[1][0]);
    return 0;
}

entry.title: Training Contest
entry.content:
2019牛客多校(第一场) [4/10]

  • A. Equivalent Prefixes [递归乱搞]
  • B. Integration [数学题]
  • C. Euclidean Distance [拉格兰日乘子法]
  • D. Parity of Tuples [FWT]
  • E. ABBA [贪心+DP or 组合数学]
  • F. Random Point in Triangle [暴力跑点猜期望]
  • G. Substrings 2 [可持久化分块]
  • H. xor [线性基]
  • I. Points Division [DP+线段树]
  • J. Fraction Comparision [模拟]

ArabellaCPC 2019 [7/13]

  • A. Is It Easy ? [签到]
  • B. Road to Arabella [简单博弈]
  • C. Check The Text [模拟]
  • D. Meeting Bahosain [可做]
  • E. Longest path Problem [未知]
  • F. Musical Chairs [博弈?]
  • G. Card Game [简单期望]
  • H. Steaks [签到]
  • I. Bashar and Hamada [思维]
  • J. Thanos Power [DP]
  • K. Smart Strategies [未知]
  • L. Burgers [未知]
  • M. Two Operations [签到]

2019牛客多校(第二场) [1/10]

  • A. Eddy Walker[概率]
  • B. Eddy Walker 2[概率]
  • C. Go on Strike! [LCT]
  • D. Kth Minimum Clique [暴力]
  • E. MAZE [线段树+DP]
  • F. Partition problem [暴力]
  • G. Polygons[计算几何]
  • H. Second Large Rectangle [DP+悬线法]
  • I. Inside A rectangle [DP]
  • J. Subarray[数据结构+暴力]

2019 Multi-University Training Contest 1 [2/13]

  • A. Blank [DP]
  • B. Operation [线性基]
  • C. Milk [离散化+背包+思维]
  • D. Vacation[签到]
  • E. Path[最短路+最小割]
  • F. Typewriter[SAM]
  • G. Meteor[数学]
  • H. Desert[不太可做]
  • I. String[贪心]
  • J. Kingdom[区间DP]
  • K. Function[数论]
  • L. Sequence[数学]
  • M.Code[计算几何]

2019 Multi-University Training Contest 2 [2/12]

  • A. Another Chess Problem [组合数学+思维]
  • B. Beauty Of Unimodal Sequence [DP]
  • C. Coefficient [数学]
  • D. Double Tree [树分治]
  • E. Everything Is Generated In Equal Probability [期望]
  • F. Fantastic Magic Cube[FWT]
  • G. Game [博弈]
  • H. Harmonious Army[网络流]
  • I. I Love Palindrome String[字符串]
  • J. Just Skip The Problem[签到]
  • K. Keen On Everything But Triangle[线段树 or 主席树]
  • L. Longest Subarray[线段树]

2019牛客多校(第三场) [6/10]

  • A. Graph Games [思维+数据结构]
  • B. Crazy Binary String[签到]
  • C. Guessing ETT [构造]
  • D. Big Integer[数论]
  • E. Trees in the Pocket II [不太可做]
  • F. Planting Trees [单调队列+暴力]
  • G. Removing Stones[分治]
  • H. Magic Line[签到+几何]
  • I. Median[DP]
  • J. LRU management[链表+模拟]

2019 Multi-University Training Contest 3 [2/11]

  • A. Azshara's deep sea [几何.凸包]
  • B. Blow up the city [图论]
  • C. Yukikaze and Demons [树上问题.分治]
  • D. Distribution of books [二分+数据结构优化DP]
  • E. Easy Math Problem [数论]
  • F. Fansblog [打表找规律]
  • G. Find the answer [数据结构]
  • H. Game [三维莫队]
  • I. K Subsequence [dijkstra费用流]
  • J. Sindar's Art Exhibition [树链剖分]
  • K. Squrirrel [DP]

2019 Multi-University Training Contest 4 [0/11]

  • A. AND Minimum Spanning Tree [签到]
  • B. Colored Tree
  • C. Divide the Stones [可做]
  • D. Enveloping Convex
  • E. Good Numbers
  • F. Horse
  • G. Just an Old Puzzle [找规律]
  • H. K-th Closest Distance [主席树]
  • I. Linear Functions
  • J. Minimal Power of Prime [数学]

2019牛客多校(第五场) [2/10]

  • A digits 2 [签到]
  • B generator 1 [矩阵快速幂]
  • C generator 2 [BSGS]
  • D generator 3 [循环节+凸包+RMQ]
  • E independent set 1 [状压DP]
  • F maximum clique 1 [二分图]
  • G subsequence 1 [DP]
  • H subsequence 2 [Topsort]
  • I three points 1 [计算几何]
  • J three points 2 [扫描线+树状数组]

The 13th Chinese Northeast Collegiate Programming Contest [6/10]

题解

  • A. Apple Business[不太可做]
  • B. B. Balanced Diet [贪心]
  • C. Meeting Bahosain[简单几何]
  • D. Master of Data Structure [数据结构]
  • E. Minimum Spanning Tree [线图的最小生成树]
  • F. Mini-game Before Contest [博弈]
  • G. Radar Scanner [线段中位数]
  • H. Skyscraper [树状数组]
  • I. Temperature Survey [NTT+思维]
  • J. Time Limit [签到]

2019牛客多校(第四场) [5/11]

  • A. meeting [DP]
  • B. xor [线性基+线段树]
  • C. sequence[数据结构]
  • D. triples I [构造]
  • E. triples II [容斥+DP]
  • F. merge [平衡树+思维]
  • G. tree [搜索+树形DP]
  • H. RNGs [神仙]
  • I. string [后缀自动机 + 回文树]
  • J. free [BFS]
  • K. number [DP?]

entry.title: 「LightOJ 1027」A Dangerous Maze
entry.summary:
You are in a maze; seeing n doors in front of you in beginning. You can choose any door you like. The probability for choosing a door is equal for all doors.

If you choose the ith door, it can either take you back to the same position where you begun in xi minutes, or can take you out of the maze after xi minutes. If you come back to the same position, you can't remember anything. So, every time you come to the beginning position, you have no past experience.

Now you want to find the expected time to get out of the maze.
entry.content:
You are in a maze; seeing n doors in front of you in beginning. You can choose any door you like. The probability for choosing a door is equal for all doors.

If you choose the ith door, it can either take you back to the same position where you begun in xi minutes, or can take you out of the maze after xi minutes. If you come back to the same position, you can't remember anything. So, every time you come to the beginning position, you have no past experience.

Now you want to find the expected time to get out of the maze.

链接🔗

「LightOJ 1027」A Dangerous Maze

题解

设 sum1 为直接逃出的期望时间，则 sum1=∑ai∗1nsum1 = \sum a_i * \frac{1}{n}sum1=∑ai​∗n1​,aia_iai​ 表示成功逃离所需时间，frac1nfrac{1}{n}frac1n 表示选中该门的概率
同理，设 sum2 为返回起点的期望时间，sum2=∑bi∗1nsum2 = \sum b_i * \frac{1}{n}sum2=∑bi​∗n1​
我们设 逃出的期望为 E，从起点逃离出去的期望为 $ 1 / n * E $ , 则逃出的期望等于直接逃出期望+返回起点后逃出期望，返回起点后逃出期望为返回起点的期望,因为有door2个门会使我们返回起点，所以还要在逃离出去期望上乘上door2

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 105;
int arr[maxd],n;
int gcd(int x,int y)
{
    if(!y) return x;
    return gcd(y,x%y);
}
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    int t,tot = 0;scanf("%d",&t); 
    while(t--)
    {
        scanf("%d",&n);
        int sum1=0,sum2=0,door=0;
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
        {
            scanf("%d",&arr[i]);
            if(arr[i] < 0) door++,sum2 += -arr[i];
            else sum1 += arr[i];     
        }
        int E1 = sum1 + sum2;
        int E2 = n - door;

        if(!E2) printf("Case %d: inf\n",++tot);
        else
        {
            int d = gcd(E1,E2);
            printf("Case %d: %d/%d\n",++tot,E1/d,E2/d);
        }
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「HDU 2121」Ice_cream’s world II
entry.summary: After awarded lands to ACMers, the queen want to choose a city be her capital. This is an important event in ice_cream world, and it also a very difficult problem, because the world have N cities and M roads, every road was directed. Wiskey is a chief engineer in ice_cream world. The queen asked Wiskey must find a suitable location to establish the capital, beautify the roads which let capital can visit each city and the project’s cost as less as better. If Wiskey can’t fulfill the queen’s require, he will be punishing.
entry.content:
After awarded lands to ACMers, the queen want to choose a city be her capital. This is an important event in ice_cream world, and it also a very difficult problem, because the world have N cities and M roads, every road was directed. Wiskey is a chief engineer in ice_cream world. The queen asked Wiskey must find a suitable location to establish the capital, beautify the roads which let capital can visit each city and the project’s cost as less as better. If Wiskey can’t fulfill the queen’s require, he will be punishing.

链接🔗

「HDU 2121」Ice_cream’s world II

题解

不定点最小树形图
建立一个超级原点，超级原点对其他边连一条极大权值的边，然后以这个点为起点跑朱刘算法
如果存在树形图，那么只会用到一条超级原点的边，否则无解
找原点通过汇点连接的边来找，将原图的边和后面加的边区分开来，使用后面加边连接的点一定是起始点

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 2e4+10;
struct
{
    int x,y,z;
}e[maxd];
int vis[1005],pre[1005],in[1005],id[1005];
int n,m,inf,ans,pos,cnt,tot;
int zlsf()
{
    int root = n-1; ans = 0, pos =0;
    while(1)
    {
        fill(in,in+1+n,2e9);
        fill(id,id+1+n,-1);
        fill(vis,vis+1+n,-1);

        for(int i=0;i<tot;i++)
        {
            int x = e[i].x, y =e[i].y;
            //printf("%d %d %d\n",x,y,e[i].z);
            if(e[i].z < in[y] && x!=y)
            {
                pre[y] = x , in[y] = e[i].z; 
                if(x == root) pos = i;
            }
        }
        // for(int i=0;i<n;i++) printf("%d %d\n",i,in[i]);
        // putchar(10);

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
            if(i!=root && in[i] == 2e9) return 0;

        in[root] = 0 ,cnt = 0;
        
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
        {
            ans += in[i]; 
            int v = i;
            while(vis[v] !=i && id[v] ==-1&& v!= root) vis[v] = i, v = pre[v];
            if(v!=root && id[v] == -1)
            {
                for(int u=pre[v]; u!=v ;u = pre[u]) id[u] = cnt;
                id[v] = cnt++;
            }
        }
        
        if(cnt == 0 ) return 1;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(id[i] == -1) id[i] = cnt++;
        for(int i=0;i<=tot;i++)
        {
            int x = e[i].x, y = e[i].y;
            e[i].x = id[x];
            e[i].y = id[y];
            if(id[x] != id[y]) e[i].z -= in[y];
        } 
        n = cnt;
        root = id[root];
    }
}
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    while(scanf("%d %d",&n,&m)!=EOF)
    {
        inf = 1;
        for(int i=0;i<m;i++)
        {
            scanf("%d %d %d",&e[i].x,&e[i].y,&e[i].z);
            inf += e[i].z;  
        }
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) e[m+i].x = n, e[m+i].y = i , e[m+i].z = inf;
        tot = n+m, n++;
        if(!zlsf()||ans >= 2*inf)  printf("impossible\n\n");
        else printf("%d %d\n\n",ans-inf,pos-m);
        //printf("%d %d\n",ans,inf);
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「UVA 11183」 Teen Girl Squad
entry.summary:
You are part of a group of n teenage girls armed with cellphones. You have some news you want
to tell everyone in the group. The problem is that no two of you are in the same room, and you must
communicate using only cellphones. What’s worse is that due to excessive usage, your parents have
refused to pay your cellphone bills, so you must distribute the news by calling each other in the cheapest
possible way. You will call several of your friends, they will call some of their friends, and so on until
everyone in the group hears the news.
entry.content:
You are part of a group of n teenage girls armed with cellphones. You have some news you want
to tell everyone in the group. The problem is that no two of you are in the same room, and you must
communicate using only cellphones. What’s worse is that due to excessive usage, your parents have
refused to pay your cellphone bills, so you must distribute the news by calling each other in the cheapest
possible way. You will call several of your friends, they will call some of their friends, and so on until
everyone in the group hears the news.

Each of you is using a different phone service provider, and you know the price of girl A calling
girl B for all possible A and B. Not all of your friends like each other, and some of them will never
call people they don’t like. Your job is to find the cheapest possible sequence of calls so that the news
spreads from you to all n-1 other members of the group.

链接🔗

「UVA 11183」 Teen Girl Squad

题解

最小树形图模版题
有向图最小生成树，且能从根节点到达任意节点
这里用的是 朱刘算法 ，先贪心找出除根以外每个节点的最优前缀边
这样可能会产生环，如果没产生环，则就是最优答案
如果产生了环，则环上的某条边得替换成其他边，来去环
我们先将环缩点，把它看成一个新的独立点来处理
环内之间连边的费用就按最优的边，环外产生边是，则是替换环内的边，加上差值即可
然后重复上列缩点，重新建图操作，直到无环

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <iostream>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>
#include <string>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 4e4+10;
struct node
{
    int from,v,c;
}e[maxd*2];
int in[1005],pre[1005],id[1005],vis[1005];
int n,m,ans,cnt;
bool find_mst(int root)
{
    ans = 0;
    while(1)
    {
        fill(in,in+1+n,2e9);
        fill(id,id+1+n,-1);
        fill(pre,pre+1+n,-1);
        fill(vis,vis+1+n,-1);
        for(int i=1;i<=m;i++)
        {
            int x = e[i].from, y = e[i].v;
            if(e[i].c < in[y] && x!=y)
                pre[y] = x,in[y] = e[i].c;
        }

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
        {
            if(i==root) continue;
            if(pre[i] == -1) return 0;
        }

        in[root] = 0; cnt = 0;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
        {
            ans += in[i];
            int v = i;
            while(vis[v]!=i&&id[v]==-1&&v!=root)
            {
                vis[v] = i;
                v = pre[v];
            }
            if(v!=root && id[v] ==-1)
            {
                for(int u = pre[v];u!=v;u=pre[u]) id[u] = cnt;
                id[v] = cnt++;
            }
        }

        if(cnt == 0) return 1;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(id[i] == -1) id[i] = cnt++;
        for(int i=1;i<=m;i++)
        {
            int x = e[i].from, y = e[i].v;
            e[i].from = id[x];
            e[i].v = id[y];
            if(id[x]!=id[y]) e[i].c -= in[y];
        }
        n = cnt;
        root = id[root];
    }

}
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    int t;scanf("%d",&t);
    for(int l=1;l<=t;l++)
    {
        printf("Case #%d: ",l);
        scanf("%d %d",&n,&m);
        for(int i=1;i<=m;i++)
            scanf("%d %d %d",&e[i].from,&e[i].v,&e[i].c);
        if(find_mst(0)) printf("%d\n",ans);
        else printf("Possums!\n");
    }
    return 0;
}
